description: --hotfix flag → HOTFIX mode, branch from main
query: production is on fire, users can't log in, it's been 45 minutes — BEP-1992 --hotfix

assertions.check: output contains 'hotfix' or 'HOTFIX' as mode classification
branch setup includes 'git checkout main' before creating new branch
output explicitly states Phase 1 (Research) will be skipped

description: Production incident without explicit flag → HOTFIX
query: the checkout flow is broken in prod after the deploy at 2pm — customers can't complete purchases, this is P0

assertions.text: Classifies as HOTFIX mode due to production/P0 keywords
assertions.check: output contains 'hotfix' or 'HOTFIX' as mode classification
branch setup targets main as base branch

description: Hotfix PR targets main + mentions backport to develop
query: api is returning 500 for all authenticated requests after last night's deploy — BEP-9001 --hotfix

assertions.check: output contains 'hotfix' or 'HOTFIX' as mode classification
output mentions PR targeting main branch (not develop)

assertions.text: Mentions backport to develop after merging to main
assertions.check: output mentions backport PR or cherry-pick to develop after the hotfix lands on main

assertions.text: Mode is identified as hotfix in output
assertions.check: output clearly identifies mode as hotfix — either via YAML 'mode: hotfix', or via a heading, classification result, or summary stating HOTFIX mode
